channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Motlanthe criticises governance failures and xenophobic violence in South Africa
item.description: Former President Kgalema Motlanthe has warned that xenophobic violence and social unrest in South Africa are driven by poor leadership and lack of sustained economic growth. Speaking at the Motlanthe ...

item.title: Lahore faces severe monsoon flooding and infrastructure challenges
item.description: Heavy monsoon rains caused widespread water accumulation across Lahore, severely disrupting daily life and traffic. Over 343 millimetres of rain fell in 48 hours, leading to stagnant water on major ro...

item.title: DMW Revives Graft Charges Against Former OWWA Chief Arnell Ignacio
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) has formally requested the Office of the Ombudsman to reconsider its dismissal of graft complaints against former Overseas Workers Welfare Administration (OWWA)...

item.title: Bandits Kidnap 40 in Zamfara, Displace Thousands
item.description: Bandits have kidnapped at least 40 people and attacked communities in Zamfara State, forcing residents to flee their homes. The attacks, which lasted four consecutive days, have left several villages ...

item.title: A Fictional Encounter Reignites Shashi's Desire
item.description: The excerpt follows Shashi, a woman navigating a complex relationship dynamic. The narrative begins with her preparing for a meeting with Vishnu, her husband, while friends Nirmala and Athe help her g...

item.title: Dawid Kruiper Municipality Faces Water Crisis and Corruption Probe
item.description: The Dawid Kruiper Local Municipality in South Africa is grappling with severe water infrastructure failures, including persistent leaks and sewage spills that have become a daily reality for residents...

item.title: GOP Blocks Bipartisan Deepfake Victim Protection Bill to Prevent AOC's 2028 Win
item.description: House Republican leaders have stalled a bipartisan bill aimed at protecting victims of nonconsensual deepfake pornography, according to a report. The Disrupt Explicit Forged Images and Non-Consensual ...

item.title: Dow Surpasses Profit Expectations Due to Rising Polyethylene Prices and Adjusts Savings Goals
item.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average exceeded profit forecasts in the second quarter of 2026, driven by significant increases in polyethylene prices. This surge in raw material costs has positioned the co...

item.title: Linda Mwanchi's Pay Bill Platform Restored After Technical Glitch
item.description: Linda Mwanchi's Paybill platform experienced a technical disruption on July 23, halting contributions to the opposition movement. ODM Senator Edwin Sifuna alleged that Safaricom intentionally disabled...

item.title: Dodgers' White House visit sparks debate over L.A. and Trump's policies
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers' planned visit to the White House has ignited controversy, with critics arguing the team's decision to meet with President Trump undermines efforts to protect Los Angeles from ...

item.title: Tanzania Boosts Health Sector with Korean Investment Project
item.description: The article highlights Tanzania's recent initiatives to strengthen its healthcare infrastructure through a significant investment from South Korea. A 7.26 billion Tanzanian shilling project is set to ...

item.title: Photographer Captures Mesmerizing Lavender Fields in Southern France
item.description: The article highlights the breathtaking lavender fields of Valensole in Southern France, captured through the lens of self-taught photographer Samir Belhamra. These images, taken at night, showcase th...

item.title: DFA Clarifies No China Approval Needed for Ayungin Shoal Missions
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) clarified that the Philippines does not need China’s permission to conduct rotation and resupply missions to Ayungin (Second Thomas) Shoal. The 2024 provisional...

item.title: Trump's Condition on Saudi Nuclear Deal: Normalisation with Israel
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced that the previously agreed nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia, allowing the Gulf Kingdom to enrich uranium, will now be contingent on Saudi Arabia normalising ties ...

item.title: Anton Jäger's 'Hyperpolitics' Explores the Fragmented Nature of Modern Political Movements
item.description: Anton Jäger's book 'Hyperpolitics: Extreme Politicization without Political Consequences' examines the evolution of political engagement in the 21st century. Jäger outlines four eras: mass politics (1...

item.title: Chongolo sets four-month deadline for Karatu onion market completion
item.description: The news highlights the government's decision to set a four-month deadline for the completion of the Karatu onion market project. This initiative aims to address delays in infrastructure development t...

item.title: House Committee Demands Suspension of NRS Recruitment Amid Constitutional Disputes
item.description: The House of Representatives Committee on Federal Character has condemned the Nigeria Revenue Service (NRS) Chairman, Dr. Zacch Adedeji, for disregarding the National Assembly's constitutional authori...

item.title: Houthi attacks drive oil prices near $100 as supply routes face disruption
item.description: Crude oil prices hit new highs as Houthi attacks on Saudi tankers in the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb Strait spark fears of global supply disruptions. Brent crude approached $100 per barrel, up 4.21% to ...

item.title: The Westies soundtrack features a mix of punk and Irish music
item.description: The Westies, a crime drama series created by Chris Brancato and Michael Panes, explores the tensions within New York's Irish-American gang during the early 1980s. The show, available on MGM+, blends p...

item.title: Wildfire Evacuees from Ontario First Nations Struggle with Mental Health and Resource Challenges
item.description: Over 2,800 wildfire evacuees from First Nations communities in Ontario's far north are facing significant challenges, including mental health struggles, limited access to essential resources, and syst...
